title: facility — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for booking-create routes. Off = every POST /bookings returns 503 with a maintenance banner. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of the resource_bookings table).
Overlap check runs under SERIALIZABLE isolation. Off = REPEATABLE_READ (documented drift risk; the reconciler catches slippage). Test envs may flip off for concurrency benchmarks.
Off = pass credit consumption on booking-create is skipped (bookings still succeed, pass credits are not decremented). Emergency-only if the atomic increment is racing.
Off = FacilityBlackoutAdded does NOT cascade-cancel affected bookings. Admins must manually cancel. Test/staging only.
Off = SendBookingReminderJob no-ops. Used when notifications module is unstable to avoid backing up its queue.
Off = ReconcileBookingOverlapsJob + ReconcileBookingsAgainstRetiredFacilitiesJob skip. Only flip off for maintenance windows.
Off = MarkNoShowJob does NOT auto-transition. Admins mark manually via bookings.mark-no-show.
Off = ReceiptNumberGenerator skips (day_passes stored without receipt_number). Emergency-only when the sequence collides.
